roads: Road quality and maintenance are polity- and route-dependent.
sanitation: Urban sanitation and waste handling should be locality-specific rather than assumed.
shipping: Riverine, coastal, and overland shipping conditions must follow route and settlement packets.
messengers: Message speed depends on infrastructure, patronage, and season.
construction_norms: Building form should be tied to locality packet, available materials, and authority context.
weapon_baseline: Armed force expectations must derive from polity, law, and faction pressure rather than genre defaults.
medicine_baseline: Care quality varies by institution, faith, wealth, and access.
energy_illumination_norms: Light, heat, and work-energy assumptions should follow locality and class context.
justification: Repository synthesis layer built to make strongly supported canon operational without overriding source truth.
